newsSinceJun6: No new fundamental catalyst since June 6. A June 8 Yahoo Finance valuation piece re-aired the existing securities-fraud investigation tied to Tennant's ERP rollout (order-processing disruptions) and flagged conflicting fair-value estimates ($83.75 narrative vs $165 DCF vs $91.50 analyst target) - but the probe itself predates June 6. The autonomous-robotics buildout (X16 SWEEP April, X2 ROVR SCRUB late May, Brain Corp BrainOS Clean 2.0 partnership, $250M robotics revenue target by 2028) is all April-May news already in the score. Today's +1.34% move is flow/drift, not news.

sources.label: Yahoo Finance (Jun 8, 2026) - TNC valuation after ERP troubles and securities fraud investigation
Businesswire (May 11, 2026) - Tennant introduces X2 ROVR SCRUB autonomous scrubber
RoboticsTomorrow (Apr 14, 2026) - Tennant and Brain Corp accelerate robotic cleaning innovation

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already moved TNC down to reconcile adjusted-score rank ~90; nothing genuinely new since June 6 justifies another move. The ERP securities-fraud probe re-aired June 8 is a known overhang, and today's +1.34% is noise, so hold at rank 91 with a small drift-down on score for the lingering ERP/legal cloud.
verdicts.bull: Tennant is executing a real robotics pivot - X16 SWEEP and X2 ROVR SCRUB launched in the last two months on Brain Corp's BrainOS, a dedicated robotics org, and a $250M autonomous-revenue target by 2028 - giving the latent facility-robotics optionality the strict screen looks for at only $1.4B cap.
verdicts.neutral: The robotics narrative is already partly priced (YTD +16.9%, ~33% 90-day run), the AI-chain linkage remains speculative (cleaning robots, not compute bottleneck), and the ERP probe caps near-term rerating; score and rank fairly reflect a medium-evidence latent node.
verdicts.bear: The securities-fraud investigation tied to the ERP rollout that blocked customer order processing could escalate into restatements or guidance cuts, and a legacy industrial-equipment maker re-skinned as a robotics story may de-rate hard if robotics revenue milestones slip.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 earnings (early August) showing ERP disruption resolved plus first sell-through data on X16 SWEEP / X2 ROVR SCRUB toward the $250M robotics target.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Escalation of the ERP-related securities-fraud investigation into formal action or financial restatement, compounding the order-processing disruption.
